name: Apple Carrot Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, wheat bran, baking soda, and cinnamon.
3. In another bowl, mix together the oil, sorghum, soymilk, and vanilla extract.
4. Combine the wet and dry ingredients in a third bowl, mixing well until no lumps remain.
5. Stir in the shredded carrots and finely chopped apple.
6. Grease and flour muffin tins, then fill each cavity about 1/2 full with the batter.
7. Bake for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
8. Makes 1 dozen muffins.
